title: Reusable Strengthened Glass Travel Cup - Spill Proof Insulated Coffee Mug - 12oz/340ml BPA-Free Hot Drink Travel Mug with Lid & Silicone Band (Pink, 12oz / 340ml)
features: VOTED TOP CHOICE TRAVEL MUG BY THE INDEPENDENT: Strengthened glass, effortless functionality, delicious flavour preservation properties - take your first sip, and you’ll see why our coffee travel mug is the top choice cup!
YOUR SOLECUP GUARANTEE: We know how important a perfect cuppa is for you. When you purchase our glass insulated mug, you will get a full refund if you don’t love how your coffee tastes.
NO SPILLS: You won’t have to worry about splashes and spills on your clothes as this travel coffee mug’s sturdy press-close lid gives you one-hand drinking functionality while on the go!
ELEVATE YOUR COFFEE EXPERIENCE: Our strengthened glass design nurtures your coffee, protecting delicate flavours and preventing any lingering aftertastes, unlike other reusable coffee cups.

MAKE YOUR LIFE EASIER: Near a coffee machine? A Barista-friendly size fits your coffee cup travel mug comfortably underneath. A dishwasher friendly design makes maintenance simple - click “Add to Cart” now.
description: Product Description The SoleCup Original Silicone Voted the Independent's top choice travel mug. Are you wondering what’s the perfect cup to drink your coffee? A SoleCup ends that debate! Established in Birmingham, UK, SoleCup is a family-run company big on sustainability and even bigger on delivering you the perfect cuppa. Our mission doesn't stop at reusable coffee cups. With each of our cups, we make sure we’re enhancing all the delicious flavours in your favourite drinks. Solecup continues to grow out of a love for good coffee and a simple idea that using less and caring for the environment brings us closer to a sustainable lifestyle. Taste is everything. We use strengthened glass for our cups so you can enjoy your hot and cold drinks without removing any of the delicious flavours. What's included in my order? The Original SoleCup - Reusable Glass Coffee Cup Screw-top Lid with Press-Close Opening Silicone Grip Band Barista Friendly As the winner of The Independent’s Top Choice Travel Mug Award and Theo Paphitis’s Small Business Sunday Award, we’re renowned for preparing you the perfect cup of coffee. As well as incredible coffee, at SoleCup, we bring you convenience, too! Just place your SoleCup mug under a coffee shop machine, and fill up your SoleCup. Great Taste - No Compromises Whether you go from drinking a double americano to a delicate mint tea, every drink tastes exactly as it should - pure and full of flavour. Our glass cups won't absorb flavours and you won’t experience any horrible aftertaste, unlike other travel mugs for hot drinks! No More Splashes Coffee stains on your white shirt? Not anymore! A screw top lid stops any of your beverages from escaping, and a press-close top prevents any splashes. And the best part? One hand open and close functionality allows you to enjoy your beverages effortlessly on the go! Your Long-Lasting Travel Mug We only choose robust, recyclable materials when making our SoleCups. They are designed to withstand daily use and built to go wherever you do - so you have a mug you can use for years to come. FAQS What is my SoleCup made of, and are they BPA Free? Yes, your SoleCup is 100% BPA Free. Your SoleCup is made with durable, heat-resistant borosilicate glass. Also, our cups come in a selection of silicone or cork grips. The lids use plastic and stainless steel to create a premium drinking experience that lasts for years to come. Can I put my SoleCup in the Dishwasher & Microwave? Yes, but here are a few things we ask you to do first. Dishwasher: Remove bands attached to your SoleCup. Microwave: Remove the lid before placing your SoleCup in your microwave. Will my SoleCup fit in my car cup holder? Yes, SoleCups will fit in most car cup holders. The size of the product is included in the listing to ensure the perfect fit for your needs. Is the SoleCup 100% leakproof? While the SoleCup is not 100% leakproof, you can feel confident carrying around your SoleCup without any untimely splashes or spills. A screw lid and press-close design give you the freedom to enjoy your beverage on the go without worrying about making a mess. However, we recommend not storing your SoleCup in a rucksack or handbag; pressure against the lid may cause it to open. Is the gap in the lid part of the design? The gap between the flap and the lid is a natural part of the design and ensures your SoleCup functions as intended. Rest assured, your lid closes properly and creates a secure seal. You can even turn your SoleCup upside down without worrying about leaks! This feature is specifically designed to enhance usability without compromising on performance. How long will my drink stay warm? We typically advise you to enjoy your hot drink within 30-90 minutes. If you’re preparing a hot chocolate or latte with plenty of milk, expect your drink to stay warm for 30 minutes. Coffee or tea can stay warm for up to 90 minutes without milk. Can I use my SoleCup for both hot and cold drinks? Yes, SoleCups are designed for both hot and cold beverages. Whether you're enjoying a steaming coffee, an iced tea, or a refreshing smoothie, it’s the perfect companion for any drink, all year round. Customise your SoleCup to suit your lifestyle! What sizes are available? SoleCups come in two sizes: 12oz/340ml, also called the Original SoleCup. 18oz/530ml, also called the Large SoleCup. What grip bands are available? There are two options for grip bands: The Silicone Grip Band The Cork Grip Band Why stop at coffee? Add our removeable stainless steel infuser (sold seperately) for the seamless tea-drinking experience. An all-inclusive experience in one cup. Shop the Loose Tea SoleCup to get yours! SoleCup.
